description_long: This is a two-story pizzeria building with a rectangular footprint, featuring a prominent arcade of five arches on the front facade supported by columns. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige color with a bold red base trim, and the roof is a dark, gabled structure. The front of the building has large windows above the arches, providing natural light to the upper floor, while the ground floor has open archways leading to the entrance. The side and rear walls are plain, with minimal ornamentation, except for a doorway and some signage on one side. The building sits on a stone-paved sidewalk, suggesting its placement in an urban or historic district. The overall design evokes a classic Italian or Mediterranean architectural style, suitable for a traditional pizzeria.
description: A two-story, beige and red pizzeria with a gabled roof and a front arcade of arches, set on a stone-paved sidewalk. The facade features large windows and classic Italian architectural elements.
description_view_0: The rear view shows a plain beige wall with a red base and no windows or doors, adjacent to a stone-paved sidewalk.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a simple wall with a single doorway and some signage, as well as the continuation of the stone sidewalk.
description_view_2: The front view displays the main entrance with five arches, columns, large upper windows, and the most decorative architectural features.
description_view_3: The right side view shows another plain wall with a doorway, minimal decoration, and the stone sidewalk extending along the side.
